title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of the $7 billion company Glean, shares his philosophy on starting a second unicorn after his first success. He emphasizes focus and avoiding building products that competitors already excel at, rather than pursuing scale or better models.
